userGuide.title: TruckNav Pro User Guide
userGuide.subtitle: Complete guide to all features and how to use them
userGuide.footer: © 2025 Bespoke Marketing. Ai Ltd - TruckNav Pro

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.planModeDesc: Tap the menu button (☰) in the top-left corner to open the route planner. Enter your destination using the search bar. The app will find truck-safe routes avoiding low bridges and weight restrictions.
gettingStarted.previewModeDesc: After planning, review your route on the map. Yellow warning icons show restrictions along your route. Tap any restriction to see details about height, weight, or width limits.
gettingStarted.navigateModeDesc: Tap "Start Navigation" to begin turn-by-turn guidance. The map automatically follows your position and shows upcoming maneuvers.

vehicleSetup.title: Vehicle Setup
vehicleSetup.profilesDesc: Access via Menu → Vehicle tab. Create profiles for each vehicle with dimensions (height, width, length), weight, and axle count. The app uses these to avoid unsuitable routes.
vehicleSetup.hazmatDesc: Toggle hazmat options for ADR-compliant routing. The app will avoid tunnels and routes prohibited for dangerous goods.
vehicleSetup.trailerTypeDesc: Select your trailer configuration (single, double, or no trailer). Routes are optimized based on total vehicle length and turning radius requirements.

previewFlyby.title: Preview & Flyby Mode
previewFlyby.routePreviewDesc: After planning a route, view the complete path on the map before starting navigation. Zoom and pan to examine any section of your route.
previewFlyby.flybyAnimationDesc: Tap the play button to watch an animated flyby of your entire route. The camera follows the road showing turns, restrictions, and landmarks.
previewFlyby.etaDisplayDesc: The preview shows estimated arrival time, total distance, and expected driving duration based on current traffic conditions.
previewFlyby.noAutoStartDesc: Navigation does not start automatically. Review your route thoroughly, then tap 'Start Navigation' when ready to begin your journey.

etaInfo.title: ETA & Trip Information
etaInfo.arrivalTimeDesc: The estimated time of arrival updates continuously based on your speed, traffic conditions, and remaining distance.
etaInfo.remainingDistanceDesc: Shows the total distance left to your destination, displayed in your preferred units (miles or kilometers).
etaInfo.remainingTimeDesc: Displays the estimated driving time remaining, accounting for current and predicted traffic delays.
etaInfo.tripStripDesc: The compact strip at the bottom shows key trip info: next maneuver, distance to turn, ETA, and total remaining distance.

controlButtons.title: Map Control Buttons
controlButtons.compassDesc: Tap to reset map orientation to north-up. The arrow indicates your current heading direction.
controlButtons.recenterDesc: Tap to snap the map back to your current GPS position with automatic zoom level.
controlButtons.3dButtonDesc: Toggle between 2D flat view and 3D tilted perspective for better spatial awareness.
controlButtons.satelliteDesc: Switch between road map and satellite imagery to see real-world terrain and landmarks.
controlButtons.trafficDesc: Toggle live traffic overlay showing congestion levels with color-coded roads.
controlButtons.zoomInDesc: Tap or pinch to zoom in for more detail on streets and intersections.
controlButtons.zoomOutDesc: Tap or pinch to zoom out for a wider overview of your route.
controlButtons.layersDesc: Access additional map layers including truck stops, fuel stations, rest areas, and weigh stations.

3dMap.title: 3D Map & Terrain
3dMap.tiltedViewDesc: The 3D perspective shows the road ahead with depth, making it easier to anticipate upcoming turns and landmarks.
3dMap.buildingsDesc: At zoom level 14+, buildings appear as 3D structures. Taller buildings appear darker, helping identify city centers and landmarks.
3dMap.hillShadingDesc: Terrain elevation is shown with shading, helping visualize hills, mountains, and valleys along your route.
3dMap.rotationDesc: The map rotates to match your heading direction, keeping the road ahead always at the top of the screen.

restrictions.title: Restriction Warnings
restrictions.panelDesc: During preview mode, a panel shows all restrictions on your route. Critical violations (red) must be avoided. High (orange) and medium (yellow) require attention.
restrictions.markersDesc: Yellow triangle icons on the map show restriction locations. Tap any marker to see details including the specific dimension that violates your vehicle profile.
restrictions.heightLimitDesc: Bridges and tunnels with height restrictions are marked. The app warns if your vehicle height exceeds the clearance.
restrictions.weightLimitDesc: Roads with weight restrictions are flagged. Routes are calculated to avoid roads that cannot support your vehicle's gross weight.

dynamicRoutes.title: Dynamic Route Suggestions
dynamicRoutes.alternativeDesc: During navigation, the app checks every 5 minutes for faster routes. When a quicker option is found, a green banner appears showing time savings. Tap "Switch Route" to accept.
dynamicRoutes.oneTouchDesc: When an alternative route is suggested, tap once to accept it immediately. The app automatically recalculates and guides you on the new path.

incidentReporting.title: Incident Reporting
incidentReporting.voiceReportDesc: Tap the microphone button and speak to report incidents hands-free. Say what you see and the app will categorize it automatically.
incidentReporting.trafficJamDesc: Report heavy traffic or standstill conditions. Other drivers will see this and can choose alternative routes.
incidentReporting.accidentDesc: Report accidents on the road. Include lane information if possible by saying 'accident left lane' or 'accident blocking road'.
incidentReporting.roadHazardDesc: Report obstacles, debris, potholes, or dangerous conditions. Be specific: 'debris in right lane' or 'large pothole'.
incidentReporting.policeSpeedCameraDesc: Report police presence or speed cameras. Say 'police ahead' or 'speed camera' to alert other drivers.
incidentReporting.roadClosureDesc: Report closed roads or blocked routes. The app will suggest alternatives and warn other drivers.

voiceFeatures.title: Voice Features
voiceFeatures.guidanceDesc: Turn-by-turn voice instructions guide you through each maneuver. Volume adjusts automatically when using phone calls or music.
voiceFeatures.dictationDesc: Speak your destination instead of typing. Tap the microphone in the search bar and say the address or place name.
voiceFeatures.commandsDesc: Control the app hands-free with commands like 'mute guidance', 'show traffic', 'find fuel station', or 'cancel navigation'.
voiceFeatures.languageSyncDesc: Voice guidance language matches your app language setting. Change languages in Settings to hear instructions in your preferred language.

alertsHaptics.title: Alerts & Haptic Feedback
alertsHaptics.speedWarningDesc: Visual and audio alerts when exceeding the speed limit. The speedometer turns red and a warning sound plays.
alertsHaptics.hapticFeedbackDesc: Your device vibrates for important events: button presses, turn warnings, speed alerts, and arrival notifications.
alertsHaptics.fatigueAlertDesc: After extended driving, the app reminds you to take a break. Shows nearby rest areas and truck stops for safe stopping.

arNavigation.title: AR Navigation Overlay
arNavigation.cameraViewDesc: Point your phone at the road ahead. The AR overlay shows navigation arrows and turn indicators on the live camera view.
arNavigation.maneuverOverlayDesc: Upcoming turns are displayed as arrows overlaid on the real road, making it easy to see exactly where to turn.
arNavigation.speedDisplayDesc: Your current speed, the speed limit, and distance to next turn appear at the top of the AR view for quick reference.

widgets.title: Dashboard Widgets
widgets.speedDesc: Shows your current speed with color coding: green (under limit), yellow (near limit), red (over limit).
widgets.etaDesc: Displays your estimated arrival time, updating in real-time based on traffic and your current speed.
widgets.distanceDesc: Shows remaining distance to your destination in your preferred units.
widgets.compassDesc: Displays your current heading direction (N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW).
widgets.customizeDesc: Tap and hold any widget to rearrange or remove it. Tap the + button to add new widgets to your dashboard.

facilities.title: Facility Search
facilities.findingDesc: Use the POI search in the menu to find nearby truck stops, fuel stations, parking, restaurants, and rest areas. Results are filtered for truck-accessible locations.
facilities.truckStopsDesc: Find full-service truck stops with fuel, parking, showers, restaurants, and repair services. See amenities and reviews before stopping.
facilities.fuelDesc: Locate truck-friendly fuel stations with diesel, DEF, and high-flow pumps. Compare prices and filter by brand.
facilities.parkingDesc: Find safe overnight parking at truck stops, rest areas, and designated parking lots. See availability and amenities.
facilities.restaurantsDesc: Discover truck-friendly restaurants with truck parking available. Filter by cuisine type and operating hours.

fleet.title: Fleet Management
fleet.vehiclesDesc: Track all vehicles in your fleet with real-time GPS positions, status updates, and maintenance schedules.
fleet.driversDesc: Manage driver profiles, licenses, certifications, and assign drivers to vehicles for accurate tracking.
fleet.serviceDesc: Log maintenance and service activities. Set reminders for MOT, inspections, tachograph calibration, and routine services.
fleet.fuelDesc: Track fuel purchases, calculate efficiency, and monitor fuel costs across your entire fleet.
fleet.complianceDesc: Monitor driver hours, rest periods, and regulatory compliance. Receive alerts before certifications expire.

fleetManagement.title: Fleet Management (Desktop)
fleetManagement.accessDesc: Fleet management is available on desktop only. Access via the top navigation bar. Manage vehicles, drivers, service records, fuel logs, compliance tracking, and customer billing.

pwa.title: Mobile App Installation
pwa.iosDesc: On iPhone or iPad: Tap the Share button → scroll down and tap 'Add to Home Screen' → tap 'Add' to install.
pwa.androidDesc: On Android: Tap the menu (three dots) → tap 'Install App' or 'Add to Home Screen' → confirm installation.
pwa.offlineDesc: Once installed, the app works offline with cached maps and routes. Download areas in advance for navigation without internet.

settings.title: Settings & Preferences
settings.languageDesc: Access via Menu → Settings. Choose your preferred language. The entire app interface, voice guidance, and this user guide will update to your selected language.
settings.unitsDesc: Toggle between metric (kilometers, meters) and imperial (miles, feet) measurements. Speed limits and distances will display in your preferred units.
settings.themeDesc: Choose between Light, Dark, or Auto theme. Auto mode switches based on time of day or your device settings.

entertainment.title: Entertainment System
entertainment.radioDesc: Access via the radio button during navigation. Stream trucker-friendly radio stations. Control playback with the mini player at the bottom of the screen.
